{{Infobox artifact
| name = Azura (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Azura (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Azura is a gleaming, seven-foot-long [[sword]] characterized by its beauty and a temperament described as having a nasty temper and a cruel sense of humor. As a weapon, it possesses the ability to hum, vanish into [[Valinhall]], or be banished to appear on a rack. It is used by [[Travelers]] to cut open [[Gates]], including the [[Valinhall Gate]], and can be used to strike enemies or defend against attacks. The blade is capable of interacting with [[the Nye]], such as causing a man to deflate into shadows and blue light. Azura is tied to the concept of ownership through specific bearers; while it was once borrowed by [[Kai]], it remains without a permanent new bearer following his death. Until a new [[Traveler]] is chosen by the blade, certain areas like the seventh bedroom remain accessible to others. Additionally, a doll serves as an advisor to Azura's bearer.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a gleaming, slightly curved [[sword]] that serves as the key to [[Kai]]'s [[Territory]]. As the seventh [[Demon Fang]] forged by the Wanderer, this unbreakable seven-foot blade can be drawn from empty air or stretched out from [[Kai]]'s fist. While [[Kai]] often carries the weapon against his shoulder during meditation, he eventually gives the [[sword]] to [[Simon]] as one of his gifts. [[Simon]] is able to summon Azura into his hand or make the [[steel]] vanish at will, though he sometimes rests the weapon on a wooden rack.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is [[Kai]]'s long, slightly curved [[sword]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6">''House of Blades'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is the key to [[Kai]]'s [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is an item that [[Kai]] carries on his shoulder.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7">''House of Blades'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a gleaming [[sword]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura rests against [[Kai]]'s shoulder while he meditates.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a [[sword]] drawn from empty air by [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a [[sword]] that [[Kai]] gives to [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura can stretch out from [[Kai]]'s fist.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is the seventh [[Demon Fang]] forged by the Wanderer.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a [[Demon Fang]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a [[sword]] that can vanish from [[Simon]]'s hand.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a seven-foot length of [[steel]] used by [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] can make Azura vanish.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a [[sword]] that [[Simon]] can summon.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] summoned Azura into his hand.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a seven-foot unbreakable blade.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] wishes he had Azura's hilt in his hand.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a [[sword]] that [[Simon]] rests on a wooden rack.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is a [[sword]] that rests on a wooden rack.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] can summon Azura.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Azura is one of [[Simon's gifts]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c22">''House of Blades'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A gleaming blade with a black-wrapped hilt, Azura is a weapon missed by [[Kai]] and kept in [[the House]]'s entry hall. The [[sword]] can be banished back to [[Valinhall]], where it was once located in [[Simon]]'s bathroom. Through a mental call or by summoning [[steel]] and [[essence]], the blade can be reached or summoned by [[Simon]]. After [[Simon]] moves the [[sword]] through a [[Valinhall Gate]], he carries it across the grass but eventually drops it. In a final movement, [[Simon]] sweeps the blade, which is nearly twice the length of the [[Ragnarus sword]], toward the [[Incarnation]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Azura is someone [[Kai]] misses.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c2">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Azura is a gleaming blade in [[the House]]'s entry hall.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Azura was in [[Simon]]'s bathroom in [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Azura is a gleaming blade used by [[Kai]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c7">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Azura is a [[sword]] that can be banished back to [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Azura can be reached through a mental call.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Azura is a [[sword]] with a black-wrapped hilt.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] moves Azura through a [[Valinhall Gate]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] can call Azura by summoning [[steel]] and [[essence]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c12">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Azura is something [[Simon]] carries on the grass.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] dropped Azura.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] sweeps Azura toward the [[Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Azura's blade is almost twice as long as the [[Ragnarus sword]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21" />}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Residing in [[Valinhall]], Azura is a seven-foot, mirror-bright metal [[sword]] characterized by its slightly curving shape and awkward length. Although the weapon is incapable of speech, it possesses a nature that selects individuals who do not fear initiating combat. During the events in [[the House]], [[Simon]] is unable to summon or banish objects because he did not bring this silver-gleaming blade with him. However, [[Simon]] eventually pulls the [[sword]] down from a wall and grasps its hilt, an action that links the weapon to both himself and [[Otoku]]. Ultimately, [[Simon]] uses the tool by thrusting it toward the [[Incarnation]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] pulled Azura down from the wall.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Azura is a seven-foot mirror-bright and slightly curving metal [[sword]] that resides in [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Azura has an awkward length.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Azura is a [[sword]] that cannot talk.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Azura is a silver-gleaming object summoned by [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Azura is a person who picks people who aren't afraid to start fights.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Azura is a weapon with a hilt held by [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] thrusts Azura at the [[Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Azura is associated with [[Simon]] and [[Otoku]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] reaches for Azura's hilt.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] cannot summon or banish anything within [[the House]] because he did not bring Azura with him.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|until finally the man held his absurdly long, slightly curved sword in one hand. "This is my graceful beauty, Azura."<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“That’s it,” he said, reaching for Azura’s hilt.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
